organizations.name: Senate and House of Representatives of the United States of America
organizations.context: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the United States of America in Congress assembled

organizations.name: United States district court
organizations.context: may request the clerk of any United States district court to issue a subpoena

offices.name: clerk of United States district court
offices.context: request the clerk of any United States district court to issue a subpoena

roles.title: legal or beneficial owner of an exclusive right under a copyright
roles.context: The legal or beneficial owner of an exclusive right under a copyright, or a person authorized to act on the owner's behalf, may request

roles.title: model developer or deployer
roles.context: model developer or deployer means a person that develops or deploys a generative artificial intelligence model

legislation_refs.name: National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020
legislation_refs.context: has the meaning given the term in section 5002 of the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020

legislation_refs.name: Federal Rules of Civil Procedure
legislation_refs.context: governed by the provisions of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure governing the issuance, service, and enforcement of a subpoena duces tecum

legislation_refs.name: Chapter 5 of title 17, United States Code
legislation_refs.context: Chapter 5 of title 17, United States Code, is amended by adding at the end the following

named_docs.name: Transparency and Responsibility for Artificial Intelligence Networks Act
named_docs.context: This Act may be cited as the 'Transparency and Responsibility for Artificial Intelligence Networks Act'
